title: Expression Grid Studies
description: Four independent 9:16 portrait-grid studies testing same-subject consistency across family, acting, sports, and wedding-photo contexts.
creative_direction: Independent static consistency studies: each image uses a different portrait-sheet scenario while requiring one face to remain stable across nine cells with distinct expressions and poses.

en.title: Expression Grid Studies
en.description: Four independent 9:16 portrait-grid studies testing same-subject consistency across family, acting, sports, and wedding-photo contexts.

zh-CN.title: 表情九宫单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立 9:16 人像九宫格,在家庭、演员、运动和婚礼场景中测试同一人物一致性。
